name: Just Good Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Peanut butter (or less, if desired)
recipeInstructions: Combine all ingredients in a large bowl. Mix until well combined. Shape into cookies and place on ungreased baking sheets. Bake at 350°F for about 15 minutes, or until golden brown. Remove from oven and allow to cool slightly before serving. Enjoy!
